rationale_overall: The watchlist enters Q1 2024 full at 8/8 with all five technology waves represented and no thesis breaches. NVIDIA Q4 FY2024 ($22.1B revenue, +265% YoY; data center $18.4B, +409%) confirms the AI wave still in surge, not crest. IonQ FY2023 ($22M revenue, +98%; $65.1M bookings, +166%) confirms quantum building on a concrete commercial track. Uranium fell from a ~$106/lb January peak to ~$84/lb by March 31 but remains historically elevated and the AI-data-center baseload thesis for URA is intact. RKLB and BOTZ show no breaches. The defense wave is unrepresented and the FY2024 $831.8B defense appropriations bill (passed March 23, 2024) signals structural support, but defense names have already run ~24 months since Feb 2022, so adding now would mean removing an intact-thesis holding to enter a wave past buildup — does not clear the bar. Hold unchanged.
